level_00.name: 00_system_settings
level_00.purpose: The master vocabulary, brand assets, and global system rules.

level_01.name: 01_operations_space
level_01.purpose: Deep work zone for supply chain and fulfillment. No marketing data permitted here.

level_02.name: 02_marketing_space
level_02.purpose: Creative asset generation and ad copy. No operations data permitted here.

naming_conventions.global_mandate: ALL files, folders, and system variables MUST be written in lowercase snake_case. No spaces. No capital letters.

the_abc_processing_desk.folder_a: 0a_inbox_raw_data -> READ-ONLY. Humans drop high-entropy data here.
the_abc_processing_desk.folder_b: 0b_users_guide_and_logic -> READ-ONLY. Explicit .leap instructions for the specific agent.

data_isolation.rule: Never blur the Root Paths. The system must always honor the absolute separation of departments to prevent context bleed.
